headline: Assessing Masco (MAS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Mixed Short Term Returns
summary: Masco (MAS) has come onto investors’ radar after recent share moves, with the stock down about 2.5% over the past week but higher over the past month and the past three months. See our latest analysis for Masco. While the latest 1-day and 7-day share price returns have been negative, Masco’s 30-day and 90-day share price returns are positive, and its multi year total shareholder returns show that long term holders have still seen gains. If Masco’s recent pullback has you thinking about what...

headline: Is Masco (MAS) Pricing Reflect Longer Term Gains Or Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether Masco's current share price lines up with its underlying value, this article will walk through what the numbers actually say rather than just the market mood. Masco's share price last closed at US$69.80, with returns of 5.6% over the last 30 days and 8.3% year to date, set against a 3.8% decline over the past year and a 41.8% gain over three years. Recent market attention on Masco has focused on how its long term share performance of 41.8% over three years...
